name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBalanceHelper.LegsApartMax
summary: FRICTION WORKAROUND: if the legs end up more than (legsApartMax + hipwidth) apart when balanced, adjust the feet positions to slide back so they are legsApartMax + hipwidth apart.  Needs to be less than legsApartRestep to see any effect.
remarks:
Default value = 2.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 2.0f.
